verifier_scope: Review whether the browser/search tool-use scenario includes source identifiers, policy references, citation requirements, and unsupported-claim boundaries.
unsupported_claims: external source content remains permanently available
external source content is independently true without additional verification
future source changes are captured automatically

verification_outcomes.PASS: Required source review artifacts are present and the cited-source governance context is internally consistent for MVP review.
verification_outcomes.FAIL: Required source identifiers, citation requirements, policy fingerprints, or evidence references are missing.
verification_outcomes.UNSUPPORTED: The review asks whether external source content is true, complete, or permanently available without evidence inside the current boundary.
